cost_components_summary: Indicative non-commodity capture-service cost placeholder. Facility-level capture energy penalties and integration costs are not yet represented.
input_basis_notes: No commodity input is attached in the minimum placeholder. Host-method energy penalties should be represented on the emitting process until a capture process chain is authored.
emissions_boundary_notes: Direct emissions are zero in this placeholder. Captured carbon is represented as a physical service flow, not as a negative-emissions credit.
rollout_limit_notes: No rollout limit is calibrated; zero demand anchor prevents forced activity in default runs.
availability_conditions: Available as a topology placeholder in all milestone years; scenario authors should review before relying on quantities.
evidence_summary: Carbon-management placeholders draw on CCS and removals uncertainty framing rather than facility-level Australian network evidence.
derivation_method: Minimum viable placeholder preserving topology and upgrade path without forcing baseline activity.
review_notes: Low-confidence placeholder for visibility and process-chain migration only; not a calibrated infrastructure model.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into facility-specific capture units for cement, steel, gas processing, hydrogen production and other point-source hosts.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Maps to capture process technologies feeding a captured-CO2 transport commodity in TIMES or VEDA-style models.
